overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a neon-lit commercial district at night, transitioning from ground-level streets to an elevated indoor walkway. The environment features dense futuristic signage, Japanese-inspired advertisements, and a mix of open plazas and narrow corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with digital billboards

events.description: red-haired player character moves out of direct view while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: player character with distinctive red hair walking through the commercial plaza

notable_agents.action: man in business suit walking left across the frame

entered.detail: storefront with large yellow PRIMA signage and purple neon lighting
tall building facade covered in multiple layers of digital advertisements and neon displays
decorative tree with bright red leaves in a street planter
illuminated archway structure marking the entrance to the inner commercial district

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide neon-lit commercial plaza at night. The player character with red hair walks forward through the open space, passing a man in a suit on the left. Large digital billboards and the PRIMA storefront dominate the right side, while a distinctive red-leafed tree stands on the left. The camera moves steadily toward an illuminated archway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with overhead signage

events.description: street narrows significantly with buildings closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrow commercial street lined with food vendors and shops

notable_agents.action: red van parked on the right side of the narrow street

entered.detail: green neon sign with white text reading PARILLA RANCHERA with red lanterns hanging below
yellow illuminated sign for MARKO shop
traditional red paper lanterns suspended from the building facade
green walled entrance with red stairs leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower commercial street flanked by tall buildings covered in neon signage. The PARILLA RANCHERA sign with hanging red lanterns dominates the left side, while a red van is parked ahead on the right. The street becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera moves forward, approaching a green-walled staircase entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor stairwell with green walls and red carpet

events.description: entering indoor stairwell from the outdoor commercial street
transition from neon street lighting to fluorescent indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing the red-carpeted staircase within the enclosed green stairwell

entered.detail: steep staircase with red carpet runner and green painted walls
rectangular ceiling light panels providing cool white illumination
windows offering view of the street level below

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an indoor stairwell, transitioning from the neon-lit street to a space with green walls and red-carpeted stairs. Fluorescent ceiling panels replace the neon lighting as the camera ascends the steep staircase, with windows on the left offering glimpses of the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated indoor walkway with vending machines and city views

events.description: passing vending machines and digital advertisement screens along the corridor
approaching group of NPCs standing near a doorway at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated corridor, passing vending machines and looking down at the city through windows

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing near a doorway at the end of the walkway

entered.detail: red and black automated vending machines for food and beverages
large illuminated screens displaying colorful advertisements
large windows providing view of lower city levels and purple-lit building facades
green leafy plants in white rectangular planters

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into an elevated indoor walkway, the camera moves through a corridor lined with vending machines and digital ad screens on the right, and overlook windows on the left showing the city below. Potted plants line the walkway as the camera approaches two NPCs standing near a doorway at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit commercial plaza into the enclosed confines of an elevated indoor walkway. It begins in an open night plaza where a red-haired character walks past a red-leafed tree and large digital billboards toward a distant illuminated archway. As the camera moves forward, the space narrows into a commercial street flanked by tall buildings and red lanterns before approaching a green-walled staircase entrance. The scene then shifts indoors as the camera ascends a red-carpeted stairwell under fluorescent lighting, leaving the neon glow of the street behind. Finally, the movement emerges into a brightly lit upper corridor lined with vending machines and potted plants, moving toward two figures standing by a doorway.
